subject: [CLASSIFIED] New Mutation Report
bodyHtml:
[CLASSIFIED - LEVEL IV ACCESS]

Anomalous Fauna Registry - Entry #003

Designation: CHIANTI
Known Alias: "Der Aschenfuchs"
Species Origin: Vulpes vulpes
Class: Ignis

Last Recorded Location: Black Forest region, Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany
Mutation Index: 3
Threat Level: High

Physical Description: Dual-headed fox form with heat-warped air in its immediate presence.

Behavioral Notes: Locals claim the fox did not emerge naturally and is tied to an unseen presence deep within the woods.

Internal Directive: Air temperature rises when the entity is nearby.
